records.question: What community areas have crimes linked to wards with a city hall office phone number exactly 312.744.3062?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT community_area.community_area_no FROM community_area
JOIN crime ON community_area.community_area_no = crime.community_area_no
JOIN ward ON crime.ward_no = ward.ward_no
WHERE ward.city_hall_office_phone = '312.744.3062'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Crime.community_area_no
FROM Crime
JOIN Ward ON Crime.ward_no = Ward.ward_no
WHERE Ward.city_hall_office_phone = '312.744.3062' AND Crime.community_area_no IS NOT NULL

records.question: Which community area named West Englewood has a crime with case number JB337585 at latitude 41.76241338 where no arrest was made?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT community_area.community_area_no FROM community_area
JOIN crime ON community_area.community_area_no = crime.community_area_no
WHERE crime.arrest = 'FALSE' AND crime.latitude = '41.76241338' AND crime.case_number = 'JB337585' AND community_area.community_area_name = 'West Englewood'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT community_area_no
FROM Community_Area
WHERE community_area_name = 'West Englewood'
  AND community_area_no IN (
    SELECT community_area_no
    FROM Crime
    WHERE case_number = 'JB337585'
      AND latitude = '41.76241338'
      AND arrest = 'No'
  )
